questions.question: What is Vue's official self-description regarding its classification?
What is the key difference between a library and a framework?
options: Libraries are open source; frameworks are commercial
A library provides tools you call; a framework controls the flow and calls your code
Frameworks require TypeScript; libraries do not
Libraries are smaller in bundle size than frameworks
